# bankruptcymill.org

> Educational resource about bankruptcy mills -- high-volume law firms with poor client outcomes.

bankruptcymill.org is a free, open-source educational resource about bankruptcy mills and how to avoid them. Part of the Bankruptcy Transparency Network.

## Pages

- https://bankruptcymill.org/: What is a bankruptcy mill -- overview and warning signs
- https://bankruptcymill.org/warning-signs.html: Red flags that your bankruptcy attorney may be running a mill
- https://bankruptcymill.org/find-a-lawyer.html: How to find a quality bankruptcy attorney
- https://bankruptcymill.org/why-cases-fail.html: Why bankruptcy cases fail -- data on dismissal rates and attorney quality
- https://bankruptcymill.org/what-to-do.html: What to do if you suspect your attorney is running a bankruptcy mill

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
